body:
Opus review of 18c89fa + 748ea12.

IMPLEMENTATION: resolver_mutation_beads.go implements BeadCreate/Update/Claim/Unclaim/Reopen. Each opens bead.Store rooted at r.WorkingDir/.ddx, calls the store method, re-fetches via Get, converts via beadModelFromBead. BeadReopen uses store.Update to set Status=Open + clear Owner (no dedicated Reopen method, fine). Panic stubs removed from resolver.go.

FIX COMMIT 748ea12: pure lint cleanup, removed unnecessary fmt.Sprintf (gosimple S1039) on literal string with no args, dropped unused fmt import. No behavior change.

TEST COVERAGE: graphql_mutation_beads_test.go has TC-GQL-MUT-001..005 posting via srv.Handler().ServeHTTP to /graphql (real router, real gqlgen handler). BeadCreate round-trips via a beads query for verification. Happy paths only; error paths (missing title, bad ID) not tested — test-gap debt captured in ddx-9a309f67.

VERDICT: ACCEPT.
summary: ACCEPT: all 5 bead lifecycle mutations real, wire to bead.Store methods, tests via real srv.Handler(). Fix commit 748ea12 was just gosimple lint cleanup (unnecessary fmt.Sprintf).
